_comment: 20 queries for description tuning (skill-creator). Mix of should_trigger / should_not_trigger. Pair with scripts.run_loop when ready.

queries.query: Sitecore hero is going away — rebuild it as a dumb React component for our Next 16 app from these three wireframe captures (phone/tablet/desktop). Put it under src/components/migration/Hero/index.tsx. No CMS yet.
We need a presentational PromoBanner in App Router with Tailwind 4 before Contentstack types exist; screenshots only, destination apps/web/src/components/PromoBanner/index.tsx
Visual reconstruction task: match this legacy marketing layout from PNGs (mobile first). Don't hook fetch or Contentstack. Output to components/insights/Teaser/index.tsx
Card grid from desktop+tablet+mobile screenshots for our Vail POC — presentation only, optional title/description/image per card, apps/web/src/components/CardGrid/index.tsx
Rebuild the footer chrome as static JSX from design screenshots; Sitecore dump attached but trust the images. Next 16 tailwind v4 monorepo.
Migration asked: parity component from SXA markup — but I only want the UI shell in Next, no Sitecore logic, path components/legacy/AlertBar/index.tsx
Before we wire entry UIDs: implement this banner from Figma exports as phone/tablet/desktop references in the repo. Strict presentational.
Create a dumb locale switcher UI from screenshots only — no routing logic, just presentation under components/LocaleSwitcher/index.tsx
I have HTML/CSS from production — rebuild as clean Next server component using Tailwind; screenshots also attached. Dest src/components/EyebrowHero/index.tsx
POC: feature strip component from captures; optional CTA and eyebrow props; no data layer
Add getEntry fetch for our hero in layout.tsx and connect Contentstack Live Preview for the homepage.
Write a Vitest test for getWeather cache tags.
Refactor our turborepo pipeline and cacheLife profiles in next.config only.
Implement Sitecore layout service parsing and transform to React props.
Set up Segment analytics on the new Next app.
Build a chart dashboard from CSV — not a marketing component rebuild.
screenshot of a button — make a single shadcn Button story
Run contentstack migration CLI to import entries from Sitecore export.
Pixel-perfect clone of the entire legacy homepage including all JS behaviors and API calls.
Generate OpenAPI client for our backend.
